guidance.en: Choose one: (a) You receive public benefits (Medi-Cal, Food Stamps/CalFresh, SSI, SSP, CAPI, CalWORKs, Tribal TANF, IHSS); (b) Your household income is at or below the poverty guidelines; (c) Your income is not enough to pay for basic needs AND court fees.
guidance.es: Elija una base: (a) recibe beneficios públicos; (b) ingreso por debajo de la línea de pobreza; (c) ingreso insuficiente.
guidance.zh: Choose one: (a) You receive public benefits; (b) Your household income is at or below the poverty guidelines; (c) Your income is not enough to pay for basic needs AND court fees.

guidance.en: If you checked option (a), list which public benefits you receive. You will need to provide proof such as a benefits letter or card.
guidance.es: Si marcó la opción (a), indique cuáles beneficios públicos recibe.

guidance.en: Enter the total number of people living in your household, including yourself and any dependents.
guidance.es: Ingrese el número total de personas que viven en su hogar.

guidance.en: Enter your total gross monthly income from all sources: employment, self-employment, unemployment, disability, Social Security, child support, spousal support, pensions, investments.
guidance.es: Ingrese su ingreso mensual bruto total de todas las fuentes.

guidance.en: If using option (c), list your basic monthly expenses: rent/mortgage, food, utilities, transportation, medical, child care, other necessities.
guidance.es: Si usa la opción (c), enumere sus gastos mensuales básicos.
